---
title: "The Rev. Derwent Coleridge"
---

## The Rev. Derwent Coleridge

**Dates:** (1800-1883)

### Description

younger son of the poet, father of Christabel Coleridge

### Letters

- Letter from April10 th [1883]
- Letter from March 14th 1879
- Letter from November 15th 1873
- Letter from Jany 4th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
